mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM venue_reservation r LEFT JOIN venue v ON r.venue_id = v.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE 1=1
AND v.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{venueName}, '%')
AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%')

SELECT * FROM venue_reservation WHERE venue_id = #{venueId} AND status != 2 AND ( (start_time <= #{startTime} AND end_time > #{startTime}) OR (start_time < #{endTime} AND end_time >= #{endTime}) OR (start_time >= #{startTime} AND end_time <= #{endTime}) )

SELECT * FROM venue_reservation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status != 2 AND ( (start_time <= #{startTime} AND end_time > #{startTime}) OR (start_time < #{endTime} AND end_time >= #{endTime}) OR (start_time >= #{startTime} AND end_time <= #{endTime}) )
